description.unified: Throws a spear at the farthest enemy, dealing Physical Damage, pulls them in front of you, then deals Physical Damage to enemies within range and stuns them for [1sec->3 sec].
For 7 sec, your Physical Block Chance is increased by [800->200], and when you block, you deal Physical Damage to nearby enemies and reduce their Attack by 25%.

For 8 sec, all allies’ Physical Damage taken is reduced by [(added) 20%], and you prepare to leap for 5 sec. While preparing to leap, when you block, the leap attack’s damage is increased by [8%->7%], you deal Physical Damage to the attacker, and stun them for [(added) 0.4 sec]. When casting is complete, you leap to the enemy, dealing Physical Damage and stunning them for [1sec->2.5 sec]. While preparing to leap, you are immune to status ailments.
Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by 30 and Physical Block Chance by [120->250].

IV.unified: Increases the duration of stun by [0.5 sec->1.2 sec].

dark.unified: [(added) Reduces the Physical Defense of pulled enemies by 30% for 5 sec]. [(removed) Cooldown is reduced by 2 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [(added) 1000], but cooldown is reduced by [(added) 4 sec]. [(removed) Mana cost is reduced by 1000].

dark.unified: On cast, increases all allies’ Physical Defense by [15%->24%] for [5 sec->7 sec].
Mana cost is increased by [(added) 1000], but cooldown is reduced by [(added) 6 sec]. [(removed) On cast, increases all allies’ Physical DMG reduction by 30% for 5 sec].

light.unified: Physical Defense increase is boosted by [50%->30%], and Physical Block Chance is increased by [(added) 75].

dark.unified: Physical Critical Resistance is additionally increased by [(added) 250]. [(removed) Physical Block Chance increases by 120].

description.unified: [Will to Win] increases P.Block chance by [400->100] and raises the target’s P.DMG taken by {0}% for 5 sec.
[Steel Fortress] increases DMG Boost on Block by [24%->50%] and extends the Stun duration of Leap Attack by {0} sec.

dark.unified: At the start of each battle, reduces all enemies’ Attack by [15%->25%] for 6 sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.
